title: Reconcile account at a specific date/time
objective: Verify that reconciling an account at a past date displays the balance as of that date, ignoring subsequent transactions.

steps.step: Select the 'Bank' account which has multiple transactions over the last 2 days
Note the balance as of 'Yesterday' (e.g. 800) and ensure there are transactions dated 'Today'
Open Reconciliation for 'Bank', change Date to 'Yesterday'
steps.expected_result: Recorded balance updates to show 800 (excluding Today's transactions)
Reconciliation record is saved for 'Yesterday'. Current balance remains 1000.
